summary: Backend API testing complete - 29/29 tests passed. All validation paths, error handling, CORS headers, and Groq 401 passthrough working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper error handling
Groq error passthrough works correctly (401 errors include 'Invalid Groq API key' message)
All context_window_chars bounds validated correctly (500-40000 for suggestions, 500-80000 for expand/chat)
Empty file handling returns {text: ''} as expected
seed_data_creation: None - stateless API, no DB used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is a stateless Groq proxy. All validation/error paths tested with dummy key 'gsk_invalid_test_key'. Happy path requires real Groq API key. Tests cover: health check, CORS, transcribe (file validation, empty file, oversized, invalid key), suggestions/expand/chat (api_key validation, context_window bounds, Groq 401 passthrough). MongoDB in .env is intentionally unused.

validation_paths_tested: Invalid api_key -> 401 with Groq error passthrough
